mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS noticeId, p.title AS title, p.post_txt AS content, p.post_time AS createAt, p.user_id AS senderId, u.head_portrait AS headPortrait, u.name AS username, m.status AS status FROM post p JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN message_user_notice m ON m.notice_id = p.id AND m.user_id = p.user_id WHERE p.post_time > #{timeStamp} AND p.type = 2 AND p.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY p.post_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id AS noticeId, p.title AS title, p.post_txt AS content, p.post_time AS createAt, p.user_id AS senderId, u.head_portrait AS headPortrait, u.name AS username, m.status AS status FROM post p JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN message_user_notice m ON m.notice_id = p.id AND m.user_id = p.user_id WHERE p.id=#{noticeId} AND p.delete_flag = 0

SELECT p.id AS noticeId, p.title AS title, p.post_txt AS content, p.post_time AS createAt, p.user_id AS senderId, u.head_portrait AS headPortrait, u.name AS username, m.status AS status FROM post p JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN message_user_notice m ON m.notice_id = p.id AND m.user_id = p.user_id WHERE p.type = 2 AND p.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY p.post_time DESC
select notice_id from message_user_notice where user_id = #{userId} and status = 0
select p.id from post p where p.type = 2 AND p.delete_flag = 0
mapper.update: update message_user_notice set status=1 where user_id=#{userId} and status=0
update message_user_notice set status=0 where notice_id=#{noticeId} and status=1
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS noticeId, p.title AS title, p.post_txt AS content, p.user_id AS userId, p.post_time AS createAt FROM post p WHERE p.type = 2 AND p.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY p.post_time DESC
select count(*) from post p where p.type = 2 AND p.delete_flag = 0
select count(*) from message_user_notice m left join post p ON m.notice_id = p.id where m.user_id = #{userId} and m.status = 0 and p.delete_flag = 0 AND p.type = 2
SELECT m.notice_id FROM message_user_notice m left JOIN user u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND u.delete_flag = 0
